name: python3-automat
title: python3-automat
summary: Self-service finite-state machines for the programmer on the go
description:
Self-service finite-state machines for the programmer on the go
Automat is a library for concise, idiomatic Python expression of
finite-state automata (particularly deterministic finite-state
transducers).

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for automat-visualize3.
arguments.raw: -visualize3  Option present in package usage line for automat-visualize3.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use automat-visualize3 because Self-service finite-state machines for the programmer on the go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use automat-visualize3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `automat-visualize3 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for automat-visualize3.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair automat-visualize3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `automat-visualize3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
